text.title: Rust Error Handling Worked Example
text.summary: Library Error enum with thiserror; binary app using anyhow with context.

section.title: Library — thiserror
Binary — anyhow with context
section.note: Library exposes typed variants downstream can match. Binary uses context strings — log line reads top-down: "running app" → "parsing TOML config" → "reading config at /etc/app.toml" → "permission denied".
